name: calm
description: CALM (Coding Agent Liveness Map) MCP server — call-graph-aware locate/source/edit_symbol/diff_impact and 29 tools total, backed by a multi-tier resolver (syntactic -> Stack Graphs -> SCIP) instead of grep. Bundles a SessionStart bootstrap (scaffolds the CALM tool-workflow hook + AGENTS.md into your project on first use, via `calm init --hooks --agents-md`) and a calm-guide Skill.
